title: neottia brevicaulis
intro: Neottia brevicaulis, also known as the green adder's mouth, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neottia brevicaulis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Neottia brevicaulis typically involve drying and processing the plant into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
